Bus Timings

F24 Bus Timetable Stadium Metro to Al Qusais

August 18, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Its mission is to ensure safe and smooth transport for all.

Among its various bus routes, the F24 stands out as a crucial link between the Stadium Metro Station and Al Qusais Industrial Area 3. This route operates daily with varying schedules and frequencies depending on the day of the week. Contents

F24 Bus Timings

The F24 bus route operates seven days a week with varying frequencies: From Stadium Metro From Al Qusais

Download PDF Bus F24

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or follow this link for F24 Bus Timings.## F24 Bus Route

The F24 bus route is an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation system, connecting residential, commercial, and industrial areas. It serves as a vital link for those who commute daily between the Al Qusais Industrial Area and various stops leading up to the Stadium Metro Station. This route not only facilitates access to workplaces and educational institutions but also connects to shopping centers and healthcare facilities, making it an indispensable service for many residents.

The F24 bus route covers a total of 14 stops, providing convenient access to key locations:1. Qusais Public Transport Depot

  1. Dubai Carmel School

  2. Sahara Center

  3. Al Nahda 1, Enoc

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. NMC Hospital

  2. Al Nahda 1, Mai Tower

  3. Al Nahda 1, Dewa

  4. Al Nahda 1, Dubai Scholars Pvt School

  5. Ministry of Information

  6. Stadium Metro Bus Stop

The journey from the Qusais Industrial Area 3 Terminus to the Stadium Metro Bus Stop is approximately 15 minutes, making it a quick and efficient option for commuters.

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out include the F28 bus route, which runs from Emirates Tower Metro Seaside to Satwa, Masjid and Back, and the F30 route, which goes from Mall Of The Emirates to Dubai Studio City, Glitz 2 and Return.Read Also: Dubai F34 Bus Timetable ## Journey Experience

Taking a trip on the F24 bus from Stadium Metro to Al Qusais offers a long yet enjoyable journey through a mix of residential and commercial hubs in Dubai. As the bus weaves through bustling streets, passengers can observe local landmarks, including the diverse Al Qusais area, known for its vibrant communities and accessibility to amenities like parks, shopping centers, and schools.

The route provides a smooth ride, giving travelers a glimpse of daily life in Dubai while passing through key areas that showcase the city’s dynamic urban landscape. Whether commuting for work or leisure, this route offers a convenient and cost-effective way to explore different parts of the city.## Conclusion

The F24 bus route is a vital component of Dubai’s public transportation network, offering efficient and reliable service between key areas in the city. With its comprehensive coverage, frequent schedules, and real-time tracking capabilities, the F24 bus timings and route ensures that passengers have a smooth and convenient travel experience. Whether you are a daily commuter, a student, or a visitor exploring the city, the F24 bus provides a dependable link to various destinations across Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 18, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
